value.rationale: The /fork command is a session management feature within Google's agentic coding product (Antigravity 2.0), enabling users to clone the current conversation into a new independent session for parallel experimentation. This is a partial slice of the agentic-coding capability — specifically a session/context branching mechanism — not a standalone coding agent product. It maps most closely to the existing forked-subagent pattern seen in similar offerings, and surfaces in the terminal where the agentic coding CLI operates.
